title: Prescription of election contest
doc_html:
§146.  Prescription of election contest

After a lapse of sixty days from the date of the publication of the returns of the election as provided in R.S. 33:144, no cause of action shall lie to set aside the election.
doc_text:
§146.  Prescription of election contest
After a lapse of sixty days from the date of the publication of the returns of the election as provided in R.S. 33:144, no cause of action shall lie to set aside the election.
